data.headline: Your Smile Our Masterpiece
data.subheadline: Experience exceptional dentistry in a calm, luxurious setting. From routine check-ups to complete smile transformations, we bring artistry to every treatment.

data.label: Why Pearl Dental
data.title: Dentistry Designed Around You
data.subtitle: Every detail of our practice is crafted for your comfort, health, and confidence.

items.title: Advanced Technology
items.description: Digital X-rays, 3D scanning, and laser dentistry for precise, comfortable treatments with faster healing.

items.title: Gentle Approach
items.description: Sedation options and a calming environment designed to ease dental anxiety for every patient.

items.title: Same-Day Solutions
items.description: From crowns to emergency care, many treatments completed in a single convenient visit.

items.title: Personalized Care
items.description: Customized treatment plans tailored to your unique dental health goals and lifestyle.

items.name: Cosmetic Dentistry
items.description: Veneers, bonding, and complete smile makeovers designed to give you the radiant, confident smile you deserve.

items.name: General Dentistry
items.description: Comprehensive cleanings, fillings, and preventive care to keep your oral health in peak condition year-round.

items.name: Orthodontics
items.description: Invisalign clear aligners and modern braces for straighter teeth with discreet, comfortable treatment options.

items.name: Dental Implants
items.description: Permanent, natural-looking tooth replacement solutions that restore function and confidence for a lifetime.

items.name: Teeth Whitening
items.description: Professional in-office and take-home whitening treatments for a dramatically brighter, more youthful smile.

items.name: Pediatric Dentistry
items.description: Gentle, patient care for children of all ages in a warm, welcoming environment they will actually enjoy.

data.label: Our Story
data.title: Where Science Meets Artistry
data.description: Founded in 2010, Pearl Dental Studio was born from a simple belief: dental care should be an experience, not an ordeal. Our state-of-the-art Manhattan studio combines cutting-edge technology with a warm, spa-like atmosphere where every patient feels valued and at ease. Led by a team of board-certified specialists, we have transformed over 10,000 smiles with a commitment to precision, compassion, and lasting results.

data.title: Ready for a Healthier, Brighter Smile?
data.description: New patients receive a complimentary consultation and comprehensive treatment plan. No obligation, just expert guidance.

members.name: Dr. Alexandra Chen
members.bio: NYU College of Dentistry graduate with 18 years specializing in aesthetic and restorative dentistry. Known for her meticulous eye for natural-looking results.

members.name: Dr. Marcus Rivera
members.bio: Board-certified orthodontist and Invisalign Diamond Provider. Passionate about creating beautiful, functional smiles for patients of every age.

members.name: Dr. Sarah Ashton
members.bio: Columbia-trained dentist dedicated to preventive care and patient education. Specializes in gentle techniques for anxious patients.

members.name: Dr. James Park
members.bio: Fellowship-trained oral surgeon with expertise in dental implants and bone grafting. Over 3,000 successful implant procedures performed.

items.name: Catherine L.
items.text: I avoided the dentist for years due to anxiety. Pearl Dental completely changed my experience. Dr. Chen and her team made me feel safe and comfortable from the very first visit. My smile has never looked better.

items.name: Robert & Maria S.
items.text: Our entire family has been going to Pearl Dental for five years. The pediatric care is outstanding and Dr. Ashton is incredible with our kids. We wouldn't trust anyone else.

items.name: David K.
items.text: Dr. Park performed my dental implant procedure flawlessly. The 3D planning technology they use gave me total confidence. It looks and feels completely natural.

items.name: Jennifer W.
items.text: The Invisalign treatment with Dr. Rivera was seamless from start to finish. Professional, efficient, and the results speak for themselves. Highly recommend.

items.question: Do you accept dental insurance?
items.answer: Yes, we accept most major dental insurance plans and are in-network with Delta Dental, Aetna, Cigna, and MetLife. Our team will verify your benefits and maximize your coverage before any treatment begins.

items.question: What if I have dental anxiety?
items.answer: We completely understand. Our studio is designed to feel more like a spa than a clinic. We offer nitrous oxide, oral sedation, and IV sedation options, along with noise-canceling headphones, weighted blankets, and aromatherapy.

items.question: How long does teeth whitening last?
items.answer: Professional whitening results typically last 1-3 years depending on your diet and oral hygiene habits. Our Complete Wellness members receive complimentary whitening touch-ups to maintain their results.

items.question: Are dental implants painful?
items.answer: Most patients report minimal discomfort during and after the procedure. We use advanced 3D-guided placement techniques and sedation options to ensure a comfortable experience. Recovery is typically 3-5 days.

items.question: Do you offer payment plans?
items.answer: Absolutely. We partner with CareCredit and Lending Club to offer 0% interest financing for 12-24 months on qualifying treatments. We believe cost should never be a barrier to quality dental care.

items.question: How often should I visit the dentist?
items.answer: We recommend professional cleanings and exams every six months for most patients. Those with gum disease or other conditions may benefit from more frequent visits. We will create a schedule tailored to your needs.
